product_name: 13 snapshot workbooks; 11-phase build scaffold - AI-assisted methods
project_title: 13 snapshot workbooks; 11-phase build scaffold - AI-assisted methods
final_object_type: analytic method or human-AI evaluation module
runtime_target: structured public page plus project-specific data packet and proof runner
operational_end_state: A user can apply a method, compare baseline and method-supported reasoning, record human judgment, and preserve the claim boundary.
full_build_definition: A manuscript system with chapter or section structure, source-governed argument logic, revision state, passage targets, reader-facing output, and publication-readiness checks.
full_operational_evidence_standard: Argument outline, chapter or section text, source state, revision protocol, continuity checks, reader-facing sample, and editorial acceptance criteria.
required_modules_to_build: item registry | authority classifier | route selector | promotion decision
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
promotion_stage: prototype-to-full-build; source and capture checks still govern release language
operational_status: near-operational proof package; not fully operational
fully_operational_reason: Full operational standing requires live/replayable execution evidence, source verification where sources govern claims, and outside/user validation. Those conditions are not all recorded.
execution_evidence_state: 17/17 package-verifiable runs; 0 instrumented runs still need capture.
remaining_gaps: human-verified source integration still missing | full-build readiness score below expert release threshold | outside/user validation not yet recorded
next_operational_build: Add promotion-router examples showing how a packet becomes a room, paper, software instrument, source reservoir, archive item, or blocked record.
tests_required_for_full_standing: run the representative fixture end to end | capture input, operation, output, and state/export record | verify acceptance tests and falsifier | verify privacy/no-local-path release safety | promote at least one load-bearing source to human-verified artifact integration when source claims are present | record reviewer or outside-use validation before stronger public claims
public_claim_now: May claim a prototype-to-full-build path exists; do not claim completed operational system.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
